productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Denim Analogue Steel Watch
description: Stylish and comfortable, this analog wrist watch from fastrack denim Collection is designed for those who love their everyday accessories. Case diameter: 20 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Rectangle   Metallic case with a fixed bezel and stone embellishments on the length side for added durability, style and comfort   Metallic strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and style  Colourful dial with brand logo marking the 9'o clock position  Quartz movement of time display   Screw to reset time   Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability  Water resistant up to 30 meters, which helps you wear it when swimming
